pullRequest.title: [DOM-55511] - Update Model API validation for uwsgi. Use curl instead of wget

nodes.body:
This is a backward incompatible change.

It will break model API deployment for customers using environments that have `wget` but not `curl`. This has been the case for many environments that were shipped with Domino.
I verified that `curl` is available at least as far back as Domino 4.4.
